title: The Balloon
writer: Jirô Osaragi, Yûzô Kawashima, Shôhei Imamura
actors: Masayuki Mori, Tatsuya Mihashi, Mie Kitahara
plot: Haruki Murakami is a successful family man and the head of a camera company. Unbeknownst to Murakami, his arrogant son oscillates between a mistress and a new lover who sings at a nightclub. When Murakami's disabled daughter befri...
